channel.title: PTC Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by PTC Inc. (ptc).

item.title: CVE-2026-4681 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Critical Remote Code Execution vulnerability reported in Windchill
item.description: A critical remote code execution (RCE) vulnerability has been reported in PTC Windchill and PTC FlexPLM. The vulnerability may be exploited through the deserialization of untrusted data. This issue affects Windchill PDMLink: 11.0 M030, 11.1 M020, 11.…
